testcase.name: test_public_gallery_only_active

failure.message: AssertionError: expected Rhum blanc in gallery, got [''] assert 'rhum blanc' in ''

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter39_spot_diffusion_and_register.py:155: in test_public_gallery_only_active assert "rhum blanc" in joined, f"expected Rhum blanc in gallery, got {names}" E AssertionError: expected Rhum blanc in gallery, got [''] E assert 'rhum blanc' in ''

testcase.name: test_me_crediscop
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter39_spot_diffusion_and_register.py:208: in test_me_crediscop assert "credits" in r.json() E assert 'credits' in {'balance': 17, 'href': '/espace-vendeur', 'kind': 'vendor', 'label': "CREDI'SCOP"} E + where {'balance': 17, 'href': '/espace-vendeur', 'kind': 'vendor', 'label': "CREDI'SCOP"} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
